dataList.dlg: This is a no-man’s land. The place of silence. Most employees who visit and stay here lose their minds and embrace oblivion. It has been a long while since I had a proper conversation with someone.
I have been guarding their coffins for countless years, carrying out consecrations for those who do not even have the privilege to depart for an afterlife. That is one of the few things I do here.
Still locked in that cramped room, obsessed with an unreachable ideal? I see that has not changed.
Thrash and struggle your way as far as your abilities would allow. You have a fascinating knack for finding hope in all this misery, don't you?
With enough time, it will come back to wholeness even from such devastation. For that is the nature of Abnormalities.
Their boundary has collapsed; to journey from such ruination shall be perilous.
Do not tarry overlong, lost in the fervor of ending your foes. Lose not the sight of your purpose: Abnormalities are to be exploited.
A life's early demise... shall become another one of the numerous tombstones of this place.

I eagerly await the moment you fall into despair after realizing that this cycle of pain will never end. I wish to see you kneel and resign before the might of destiny. Go on, slowly; despair and succumb to your fate. Resist to the very end, and ultimately... break yourself.

You have persevered, even in the form of a prisoner—that much I can tell. However... You still aren't qualified to look toward the bottom of the spring. Return when you can look directly toward the path your eyes turn away from.
Even if you were to break the cycle somehow, it would be a perfectly useless affair. Broken Wings will outstretch anew, and this brief resistance will soon be forgotten.
But I can never dare to look away from it all or to close my eyes, no matter how unbearable it may be.
How does it feel to stand before the high-cresting wave without her help? Go ahead and try to stop it on your own two feet, with your own power.

You must have learned by now that within each human lies a world as disparate from one another as people are.
What sort of river flows in you? What world lies in you? *chuckle* Observing them should be rather fun.
You have grown quite adept at wielding it in so short a time.
It is not surprising that you have no knowledge of that E.G.O. You have never wielded it yourself, after all.
It would seem you have somewhat realized your desire to understand the vision.
To wield E.G.O is to merely imitate what is borrowed. As exhibited... *chuckle*
The entity has left its Containment Unit. Mayhaps the space was too narrow to hold it?
They are reacting to the Qliphoth Deterrence, thankfully. We may be able to put them to sleep yet.
I see you have received a present. Beware, however. See that it does not render your own colors muddled and faded.
Do not forget. We are all of us sunken in despair still.
Well done. When cutting through something, chop with enough force, as though you were cutting a chunk of meat.
*chuckle* Are there any bottles left for you to pop open?
Your immaturity is to blame.

It's an agonizing sight to confront, but it doesn't matter to you, not at all. Or am I wrong? After all, erasing your memories and running away from them as if nothing had happened is your age-old specialty.
Excellent.
The weaker one's mind is, the more it craves refuge behind the shell of another... And yet, this made for a rather entertaining display.
I cannot help but be astonished by the potential of E.G.O each time I see you go on a rampage.
You've proven yourself. I shall witness you with my eyes.
Ah, silence, the very best of companions. No one remains... Yes, after one's final breath, only silence lingers.

Don't ask for my name. "Binah" isn't the name of a person. It's a sad name for the place where one finds many graves.
I am simply the one who draws the water. Why have you come here, and what do you wish for me to draw?
